'''''The White Witch: A Droid Adventure''''' is a [[1986]] children's book adaptation of the [[Star Wars: Droids: The Adventures of R2-D2 and C-3PO|''Star Wars Droids'']] episode entitled "[[The White Witch]]." It was written by [[Emily James]] and illustrated by [[Bunny Carter]].

{{Book-stub}}
